name: field
title: Field
description: Label + control + description/error form row with a11y wiring.

props.name: description
props.description: Muted helper text under the control; hidden while an error shows.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message; also marks the control aria-invalid.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the label with a required asterisk.

props.name: children
props.description: The control; a single child is auto-wired with id/aria-describedby/aria-invalid, or use the render-prop form.

notes: The form-row unit every clinical form composes. Adapted from petals_ui form-field (InfoHint/hint dropped for a brand-neutral base). Single-element children are cloned with a11y props; use the render-prop form for controls that need the props spread manually.
